$comment: Workflows to create on the stack + transition policy for existing entries. The seeder is idempotent: a workflow whose `name` already exists is skipped (no update). Stage UIDs auto-derive from name (slug) unless explicitly set.
$transitionPolicyComment: After creating workflows, the seeder iterates entries in each workflow's content types and assigns stages. Distribution: 50% finish at terminal stage (Approved/Ready/Done), 30% sit at middle stage (drives 'Stalled by Stage'), 20% only enter first stage. Each transition is a separate API call so cma-api emits entry_workflow_stage_added on first + entry_workflow_stage_updated on each subsequent transit.
